nodes.label: Additional Statistical Tools for BioDockify AI  Complements EnhancedStatistica
Additional statistical tools for comprehensive pharmaceutical research analysis
Initialize statistical tools          Args:             alpha: Significance l
Mann-Whitney U test (non-parametric alternative to t-test)          Pharmacovi
Interpret effect size r according to Cohen's conventions
Kruskal-Wallis test (non-parametric alternative to ANOVA)          Pharmacovig
Perform Dunn's post-hoc test for Kruskal-Wallis          Internal helper metho
Wilcoxon signed-rank test (non-parametric alternative to paired t-test)
Wilcoxon Signed Rank Test for paired non-parametric data          Pharmacovigi
Sign Test for paired binary/ordinal data          Pharmacovigilance Example:
Friedman Test for repeated measures non-parametric analysis          Pharmacov
Dunn's Test (post-hoc pairwise comparison for Kruskal-Wallis)          Pharmac
Check normality assumption using Shapiro-Wilk test
Chi-square goodness of fit test          Pharmacovigilance Example:
Chi-square test of independence          Pharmacovigilance Example:
Fisher's Exact Test for small sample contingency tables          Pharmacovigil
McNemar Test for paired categorical data          Pharmacovigilance Example:
Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel test for stratified 2x2 tables          Pharmacovigila
Manual calculation of CMH test if statsmodels fails
Augmented Dickey-Fuller test for stationarity          Pharmacovigilance Examp
Power analysis for study design and sample size calculation          Pharmacov
